intro.title: Free mock
intro.subtitle: A full 14-minute IELTS Speaking simulation with an AI examiner.

parts.title: Which parts?
parts.subtitle: All three is the standard mock.

ready.title: Before you start
ready.camera: You'll need to allow camera and microphone access.
ready.quiet: Find a quiet space — the examiner listens to everything.

live.title: Mock in progress
live.allowPrompt: If prompted, allow camera and microphone.
live.noUrl: We couldn't load your session. Please start a new mock.

report.title: Processing your results
report.subtitle: We're saving your conversation. Your band score and personalized plan will appear here once scoring is wired up.

errors.missingConfig: Tavus isn't configured yet. Add TAVUS_API_KEY and TAVUS_FACE_ID in Project Settings → Secrets.
errors.generic: Something went wrong starting your mock. Please try again.
